image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Uranium dating reveals ages that carbon can't even touch.
Context visual: Geochronology is all about timing—literally. While carbon dating stops at about 50,000 years, uranium-lead dating goes b
Escalation visual: Imagine rocks that formed when dinosaurs roamed...or even before! This method unlocks Earth’s deepest history.
Evidence visual: Uranium decays slowly over time, providing a reliable clock. Scientists use it to date zircon crystals—some over 4 billi
Payoff visual: So next time you think of ancient time, remember: uranium-lead dating is the key to Earth's age-old secrets.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into geology? Hit like, subscribe, and explore the mysteries of our planet with us!
